Container.Name: Subarr
Container.Overview:
Lightweight YouTube subscription follower (*arr-style UI). RSS polling, webhooks, and optional yt-dlp (best quality downloads to /downloads).
Defaults on this template: appdata /mnt/user/appdata/subarr, downloads /mnt/user/Youtube, host Web UI 7979 → container 3001. Logs (optional): SUBARR_LOG_DIR=/config/logs → subarr.log under appdata. Set PUID/PGID to match share ownership (99/100 = nobody/users on typical Unraid).
No built-in authentication — use LAN only or put behind a reverse proxy with auth.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: SQLite database and config. SUBARR_DB_PATH should stay under this path (default /config/subarr.db).

Config.Name: Downloads (yt-dlp)
Config.Description: Where yt-dlp post-processors write video files (container path /downloads).

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description:
Host port (left) mapped to Subarr HTTP inside the container (right = 3001). Change 7979 if it conflicts with another container.
The [PORT:7979] WebUI link uses this host port — keep them in sync.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Run as this uid (Unraid nobody is often 99). Must own or match permissions on appdata and downloads paths.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Run as this gid (Unraid users group is often 100).

Config.Name: SUBARR_DB_PATH
Config.Description: Full path to SQLite file inside the container.

Config.Name: PORT (internal HTTP)
Config.Description: Port the Node server listens on inside the container. Must match the Web UI Port Target (3001) unless you rebuild the image with a different default.

Config.Name: SUBARR_LOG_DIR
Config.Description: Directory for subarr.log (and subarr.previous.log when rotated). Set to 0 or false to disable file logging (console only).

Config.Name: SUBARR_LOG_MAX_MB
Config.Description: Rotate subarr.log when size exceeds this many MB (keeps one backup file).
